“Hitler committed suicide on 30 April 1945, shooting himself in the right temple with
response:
Adolf Hitler is not actually buried where he died. Following his suicide in April 1945, he was found dead and his body was burned in the Führerbunker, the underground command post in the center of Berlin. His personal effects were collected and he was secretly buried near the Obersalzberg mountain in the Bavarian Alps, in a mass grave with other members of the Nazi regime. 

In 1970, after German reunification and following a political deal to bury the matter, Hitler’s remains were exhumed and brought to his birthplace, the Berghof in Braunau am Inn, Austria. There, he was reburied in a mausoleum within his birth home.
